Skip to contents
ggsegYan 1.0.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Yan 17-Network 400-Parcel Atlas

Source: R/data.R
yan17_400.Rd

Brain atlas for the Yan et al. (2023) homotopic cortical parcellation with 400 parcels aligned to 17 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains both 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

Usage

yan17_400()

Value

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Yan X, et al. (2023). "Homotopic local-global parcellation of the human cerebral cortex from resting-state functional connectivity." NeuroImage, 273:120010. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2023.120010

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Other cortical_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_300(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Examples

yan17_400()
#> 
#> ── yan17_400 ggseg atlas ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 400
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 400 × 3
#>     hemi  region                              label                             
#>     <chr> <chr>                               <chr>                             
#>   1 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_IPL_1         lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_IPL_1    
#>   2 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_1          lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_1     
#>   3 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_2          lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_ST_2     
#>   4 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_1        lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_1   
#>   5 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_2        lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_2   
#>   6 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_IPL          lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_IPL     
#>   7 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC_1        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC_1   
#>   8 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC_2        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC_2   
#>   9 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC_3        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC_3   
#>  10 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_RSC          lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_RSC     
#>  11 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_1        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_1   
#>  12 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_2        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_2   
#>  13 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_3        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_3   
#>  14 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_4        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_4   
#>  15 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_1  
#>  16 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_2  
#>  17 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_3       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_3  
#>  18 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_4       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_4  
#>  19 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_5       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_5  
#>  20 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCl_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCl_1  
#>  21 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCl_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCl_2  
#>  22 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_1  
#>  23 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_2  
#>  24 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_3       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_3  
#>  25 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_4       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_4  
#>  26 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_5       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_5  
#>  27 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_TempPole     lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_TempPole
#>  28 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_1  
#>  29 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_2  
#>  30 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_3       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_3  
#>  31 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_4       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_4  
#>  32 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_5       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_5  
#>  33 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_6       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_6  
#>  34 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_7       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_7  
#>  35 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_FPole        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_FPole   
#>  36 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_IPL_1        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_IPL_1   
#>  37 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_1        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_1   
#>  38 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_2        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_2   
#>  39 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_3        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_3   
#>  40 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_4        lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_4   
#>  41 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_1  
#>  42 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_2  
#>  43 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_3       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_3  
#>  44 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_4       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_4  
#>  45 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_1  
#>  46 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_2  
#>  47 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_3       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_3  
#>  48 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_4       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_4  
#>  49 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_pCun_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_pCun_1  
#>  50 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_pCun_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_pCun_2  
#>  51 left  17networks_LH_ContC_PCC_1           lh_17networks_LH_ContC_PCC_1      
#>  52 left  17networks_LH_ContC_SPL             lh_17networks_LH_ContC_SPL        
#>  53 left  17networks_LH_ContC_pCun_1          lh_17networks_LH_ContC_pCun_1     
#>  54 left  17networks_LH_ContC_pCun_2          lh_17networks_LH_ContC_pCun_2     
#>  55 left  17networks_LH_ContC_pCun_3          lh_17networks_LH_ContC_pCun_3     
#>  56 left  17networks_LH_ContB_FPole_1         lh_17networks_LH_ContB_FPole_1    
#>  57 left  17networks_LH_ContB_FPole_2         lh_17networks_LH_ContB_FPole_2    
#>  58 left  17networks_LH_ContB_FrMed           lh_17networks_LH_ContB_FrMed

#>  60 left  17networks_LH_ContB_IPL_2           lh_17networks_LH_ContB_IPL_2      
#>  61 left  17networks_LH_ContB_PFCd_1          lh_17networks_LH_ContB_PFCd_1     
#>  62 left  17networks_LH_ContB_PFCl_1          lh_17networks_LH_ContB_PFCl_1     
#>  63 left  17networks_LH_ContB_PFCv_1          lh_17networks_LH_ContB_PFCv_1     
#>  64 left  17networks_LH_ContB_Temp_1          lh_17networks_LH_ContB_Temp_1     
#>  65 left  17networks_LH_ContA_Cingm           lh_17networks_LH_ContA_Cingm      
#>  66 left  17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_1           lh_17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_1

#>  72 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_1          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_1     
#>  73 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_2          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_2     
#>  74 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_3          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_3

On this page

Part of the ggsegverse — Gross Geometry Brain Segmentation Universe
Built with pkgdown
